embeds.title:
**Here are the list of channels that you can follow:**
Follow them by going to <id:customize>

fields.value:
**__Announcements__**

https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1473586463068127367 
> Production House announcements! 
> Pick up <@&1473944147722506262> to be notified! 
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1473588895131369533 
> For announcements of future Production house events such as World Hops, Hangouts, Workshops, and more! 
> Pick up <@&1473944023914778707> to be notified!

**__Community__**

https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1473968869675630656 
> Make a post and introduce yourself! If you have, link your previous works too! 
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1430259393144029237
> Talk to everyone here!
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1473587291543961681
> Share any VRChat screenshots and clips here!
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1430296899029565622
> Share your most recent works here!
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1480029451235623072
> See something cool someone else created? Share it here! 
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1473127235626995837 
> Share other links/memes/posts here!
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1430259393144029238 & https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1495072933578801172 
> Voice Channels to hangout and work with friends!

**__Sharing Corner__**

https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1495611345817571499 
> See a cool world in VRChat? Share it here! 
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1495613565665804389 
> Share cool & useful asset links here!
> [REMINDER!] Do not engage in piracy, and respect creator ToS.
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1495461096830533823
> Share Music here!
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1473591227718041763
> Discuss potential film ideas and brainstorm!
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1473589507981967494
> Need help on something? ask here!
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1495594811720335370
> Browse useful tutorials here to help with your films!
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1495594731844141167
> VC for our Workshop events!

**__Film Collaborations__**

https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1473592053047759003 
> Have a project and in need of help? Create a post and pitch it here!
https://discord.com/channels/1430259391474565142/1492673164113875025
> Want to help on projects? Advertise yourself here!
